Fungus Covered Great Staff  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 35
DMG: 18 Dmg Bonus: 130
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
CHA: -10 WIS: +8 INT: +8
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5
Effect: Fungal Regrowth (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 1.1 Size: MEDIUM
Class: DRU SHM BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Slot: PRIMARY

Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 35

Race: ALL

Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:25 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1875
Lucy Entry By:Yrys
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-09 23:00:44
Page Updated:Wed May 23rd, 2012

Expansion: Shadows of Luclin
Average Price: 768,500pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 1
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
King's Court Casino

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Shadow Haven

Weeeeee!

Scholar

▲ Page top
Something of note!
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2004 at 7:34 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592760072261
13 posts
Just thought I would mention this but unlike the effect on the tunic.. This one also 90% snares you so it isnt something that you want to use while in a fight or else u cant run away but because it is considered a beneficial buff you can simply click it off at any time.. I am really happy that they brought this item back.. One of the rare great items that was removed..
▲ Page top
RE: Something of note!
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2004 at 9:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362773308
32 posts
the stats for the item say 10% (L1) to 42% (L65)
▲ Page top
RE: Something of note!
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2004 at 12:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251070326
187 posts
The effect does snare you but not 90% its about 33-50% and its an instant cast and obviously you can instantly click it off I used this from lvl 35 (when it procs) tell lvl 60 solo'n with my BST just click it off when you go pull then on the way back instant click it when you get near your pet turn around and kill, rinse and repeat. This was the old one not sure if new one is instant click as well

Gatorr
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 20 2004 at 12:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have this fungus staff for sale on Xev server.Contact ifesfor or Waell.Serious buyer only plz.
uses
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2004 at 10:22 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592339709171
128 posts
This is the pre nerf version of the Fungi Covered great staff. It can only be obtained through other players or the casino. What makes it better than Fungi staff is that it can be cast from inventory by any class.
▲ Page top
geeezzz
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2004 at 6:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759415885
11 posts
what? Is there a reason the Monk can not use this?
▲ Page top
RE: geeezzz
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2004 at 10:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767080873
View User Forum
64 posts
This item is just one of many HP regen items that Monks can't use. The game's itemization "scheme" intentionally makes HP regen items harder for Monks to acquire.

Iksar BP and Belt of the Great Turtle are just 2 examples - and there are many, many more. I have noticed the same is true for many +ATK and items as well a ton of high AC gear.

In addition the many such items unuseable by Monks there are many more that although Monk equipable just weigh to much for any Monk to seriously consider using.

Why do this for Regen, ATK and AC items? I suppose the Devs figure since Monks get the Mend skill and a natural ATK and AC boost many of these items would be overpowering.

Does this make sense? It may have at one time when the game wasn't filled with so many commonly available uber items (and before the mitigation nerf).

But now with the all the great stuff they release with each new expansion, the Monk's innate abilities are no longer a fair tradeoff for their itemization disadvantage. This needs to be changed.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 19 2004 at 8:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yes, because Monks suck!
RE: geeezzz
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2004 at 6:36 PM Rating: Decent
Seaxouri
View User Forum
112 posts
Monks have never been able to use the Fungus Covered Great Staff. More than likely though, this prize is a pre-nerf one...so it can be right-clicked from inventory (hence any class can use it).
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 19 2004 at 6:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what? Is there a reason the Monk can not use this?
